element_introduction_order.mastery_context: enemies enter in waves; player learns dodge and crowd management
primary collectible; scoring incentive throughout all arenas
secondary collectibles alongside money; contribute to final tally
tactical resource management; appear mid-wave for combat advantage
strategic navigation; choose path knowing one leads to boss, others to progression
spatial awareness; shows arena layout and boss location before proceeding
culminating challenge; requires applied skill from prior arenas
optional progression gating; accumulate to unlock Pleasure Dome bonus level
optional high-reward area; not required for main progression

typical_relief_triggers: transition to map view between arenas
typical_tension_triggers: enemies enter in waves from four edges
time pressure implicit in arcade continue mechanic
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based intensity with periodic relief points; escalates within each arena as waves intensify; resets with arena transition; boss encounters provide climactic tension before next level

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: multiple exits per arena; player chooses path, one leads to boss (mandatory progression), others branch into additional arenas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: keys scattered throughout arenas signal optional Pleasure Dome content if accumulated in sufficient quantity

difficulty_curve.early_game: initial arenas introduce wave mechanics and control scheme; moderate enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: boss encounters and final levels escalate complexity; high enemy density and varied attack patterns
notable_spikes: arcade version designed with high difficulty and coin-continue dependency

notable_level_patterns.description: single-screen arenas filled with enemies entering from four edges in sequential waves; player clears all enemies to trigger exit doors; establishes core gameplay loop
after completing first arena, map reveals overall level structure; multiple exits from each arena provide branching paths; one path always leads to boss arena
designated boss arena at end of each level; requires defeating unique boss enemy; serves as skill gate and difficulty checkpoint
keys scattered throughout regular arenas as secondary collectible; accumulating threshold unlocks Pleasure Dome bonus level; rewards exploration and thoroughness
